questions.q: Which of the following is a characteristic of Business Environment?
Explain the term 'Business Environment' in the context of a firm. (7 marks)
questions.answer: The business environment is the sum of all external factors that affect a company's ability to operate and achieve its goals.

questions.q: Fill in the blank: A business environment is made up of internal and _______________________ factors.
State any two characteristics of Business Environment. (2 marks)
Which of the following is an example of a factor in the Business Environment? (1 mark)
Explain the term 'Dynamic' in relation to Business Environment. (5 marks)
questions.answer: The term 'Dynamic' refers to the constant change that occurs in the business environment.

questions.q: True or False: The Business Environment is only made up of internal factors. (1 mark)
Explain the concept of 'Interdependence' in Business Environment. (10 marks)
questions.answer: The concept of 'Interdependence' refers to the way in which different factors in the business environment are connected and affect each other.

questions.q: State any two features of the Business Environment. (2 marks)
Fill in the blank: The Business Environment consists of all external _______________________ that affect a firm's ability to operate and achieve its goals.
